title: Onboard Generate — v2 Context Shape
description: Round 6 schema (alpha.7) — Input schema for the onboard:generate skill in onboard 2.x. Hard cutover from v1: v2 callers must emit `version: 2` at the root. v1 input is rejected outright (no migration helper ships in any onboard 2.x release). Rounds 1–6 fully specify architecturalFraming, dataArchitecture, apiIntegration, auth, privacy, security, runtimeOperations, cicdAndDelivery, architecturalValidation, personas, domainModel, featureRoadmap, schemaDraftReview, plus Round 6 additions: search, caching, realtime, fileUploads, payments, frontendArchitecture, designSystem, uxAccessibilityPerf, i18nL10n, pluginRecommendation (split), pluginInstall (split). Phases authSecurity, workflow carry `_status: 'deferred-to-round-N'`. Greenfield 3.0+ is the canonical caller; direct headless callers must construct v2 contexts directly. Round 6 additions: 9 new phase blocks, 6 inline gate slots (auth.concerns.{transactionalEmail,sms}; cicdAndDelivery.concerns.featureGating; uxAccessibilityPerf.concerns.{marketingEmail,pushNotifications,productAnalytics}), pluginRecommendation/pluginInstall split, cicdAndDelivery.lockedYaml + adjustHistory[] (CI Draft Review Step 20).

version.description: Schema version. HARD-REQUIRED. Missing or any other value → onboard:generate rejects with a pointer to onboard 1.10.0 for legacy callers.

mode.description: Wizard-level mode toggles set at Step 1. Persisted in greenfield-state.json.

depth.description: Heavy: full Q-bank (~120 Qs total). Light: showInLight=true Qs only (~65).

coupling.description: Auto-loop: every downstream phase iterates per persona/entity. Hybrid: only loopMode=always Qs iterate.

domainFormat.description: Full DDD includes value objects, domain events, anti-corruption. DDD-lite drops them.

projectPath.description: Absolute path to the scaffolded project root. Generate writes artifacts under this path.

callerExtras.description: Runtime-injected payload from the caller. Stays at root (NOT nested under phases) — separates wizard data from caller plumbing.

installedPlugins.description: Plugin names installed by the caller. Drives shadowing prevention in config-generator (agents for covered capabilities are skipped).

coveredCapabilities.description: Capability tags covered by installed plugins.

allowPluginReferences.description: Permit generated rules/skills to reference installed plugins instead of duplicating their guidance. Defaults to true when installedPlugins is non-empty.

allowHttpHooks.description: OFF by default. Required true for any hookType='http' entry. Never auto-inferred.

phases.description: Wizard-captured per-phase data. Rounds 1-6 progressively specify phases. Round 6 grows the wizard to 30 steps with 9 new top-level phase blocks (search, caching, realtime, fileUploads, payments, frontendArchitecture, designSystem, uxAccessibilityPerf, i18nL10n) and 6 inline gate slots inside parent phases. Phase ids match the 30-step wizard structure documented in docs/greenfield-overview.html.

personas.description: Round 4 — discovery phase (Step 2.2). Produces persona reference data for auto-loop.

domainModel.description: Round 4 — discovery phase (Step 2.7). Produces domain reference data for auto-loop.

stack.description: Stack details. Greenfield 3.0 Round 1 fills this from wizard Steps 1-2 verbatim (no new fields).

auth.description: Phase: Auth — identity and access control decisions. Round 3 (alpha.4). Hybrid strictness: 4 required enum-locked fields drive cross-phase contradictions; remaining fields loose to accommodate provider catalog churn (Clerk, Auth0, Supabase, Firebase, Cognito).

strategy.description: Auth strategy. 'hosted' = Clerk/Auth0/Supabase/Firebase/Cognito; 'self-hosted-oss' = Keycloak/Authentik/Ory; 'built-in' = framework session/JWT; 'none' = no auth (Privacy auto-skip gate fires).

sessionModel.description: Session container. 'n/a' valid only when strategy='none'.

authzModel.description: Authorization model. RLS gated by dataArchitecture.engine support.

provider.description: Specific provider name (Clerk, Auth0, Supabase Auth, Firebase Auth, Cognito, Keycloak, Authentik, Ory, framework-native). Loose for catalog churn.

idps.description: Identity providers selected (email+pw, Google, GitHub, Apple, SAML SSO, magic links, passkeys/WebAuthn).

mfa.description: MFA configuration: required (bool), methods (array: TOTP, SMS, passkeys).

tenantResolution.description: Tenant resolution strategy when dataArchitecture.multiTenancy ≠ none (subdomain, path, claim, header). Empty when not multi-tenant.

lifecycle.description: Account lifecycle: signup flow, email verification, password reset, deletion.

passwordPolicy.description: Password policy: length, complexity, breach check (HIBP), or passkey-only.

auditLog.description: Auth audit log: events captured, retention window.

privacy.description: Phase: Privacy — privacy, consent, and data-rights decisions. Round 3 (alpha.4). Supports synthesisStatus='n/a' stub when auth.strategy='none' AND no-data-collected gate passes.

synthesisStatus.description: 'n/a' triggers stub synthesis when no auth + no data collected. All other fields optional when n/a.

regulations.description: Regulatory scope (GDPR, CCPA, LGPD, PIPEDA, HIPAA, none). Pre-filled from dataArchitecture.compliance.

piiCategories.description: PII categories collected (email, name, address, phone, location, payment, health, biometric, behavioral).

lawfulBasis.description: Lawful basis per PII category (consent, contract, legitimate-interest, vital-interest). Required if GDPR/UK-GDPR in regulations.

consentManager.description: Consent management: banner needed, granular categories, storage mechanism.

dsar.description: DSAR / data export flow: format (JSON/CSV), SLA.

processors.description: Third-party PII processors. Pre-filled from apiIntegration.externalServices.

minimization.description: Data minimization: anonymization in analytics, IP truncation, etc.

dataResidency.description: Cross-border transfer: residency requirements, transfer mechanisms (SCC, adequacy).

accessAudit.description: PII access audit log: who/when/what. Mandatory when regulations includes HIPAA.

security.description: Phase: Security — application security posture and operational controls. Round 3 (alpha.4). 3 required enum-locked fields drive cross-phase contradictions.

sensitivityTier.description: Sensitivity tier. Locked to 'high' if dataArchitecture.compliance non-empty. 'elevated' for PII/payments. Drives Sec.Q9/Q11/Q12 conditional flow.

threatModel.description: Threat model approach. STRIDE-lite checklist or formal session.

supplyChain.description: Supply-chain posture: lockfile pinning (bool), signed commits (bool), SBOM generation (bool), provenance attestation (bool).

secrets.description: Secret management: storage backend (.env, platform-managed, Vault/Doppler, cloud-KMS), rotation cadence.

scanning.description: Vulnerability scanning: deps (Dependabot/Snyk), SAST (Semgrep/CodeQL), DAST (ZAP), container scan, cadence.

encryptionAtRest.description: Encryption at rest: DB-default, per-column for PII, app-managed.

encryptionInTransit.description: Encryption in transit: TLS everywhere, mTLS for s2s, HSTS posture.

headers.description: Security headers: CORS, CSP, X-Frame-Options defaults.

inputValidation.description: Input validation policy: boundaries-only vs everywhere; library choice.

auditRetention.description: Audit log retention: window, tamper-evidence (hash chain, write-once storage). Required when sensitivityTier ≠ standard.

ir.description: Incident response policy: runbook style, notification SLA. Cross-references runtimeOperations.incidentProcess (added by T4 in the same Round 3 batch).

pentestCadence.description: Pentest cadence. Auto-skipped for hobby scaleTarget.

vdp.description: Bug bounty / VDP program. Auto-skipped for hobby.

runtimeOperations.description: Phase: Runtime Operations — background jobs, observability, alerting, feature flags, and incident process. Round 3 (alpha.4). Required fields gated by upstream skip cascades.

jobs.description: Background job system: provider (Redis/BullMQ, Sidekiq, Celery, SQS, Cloud Tasks, Inngest, Temporal, none). Auto-skipped when apiIntegration.asyncPattern='none'.

retryStrategy.description: Retry / idempotency: at-least-once vs exactly-once, retry policy, dead-letter queue.

scheduling.description: Scheduled tasks: distributed scheduler or platform cron (Vercel Cron, GH Actions, k8s CronJob).

metrics.description: Metrics: Prometheus / DataDog / Grafana Cloud / platform-native / none.

traces.description: Traces: OTel + backend (Honeycomb, DataDog APM, Tempo) / none.

logs.description: Logs: structured JSON; aggregator (Loki, Logtail, DataDog, CloudWatch); retention.

alerting.description: Alerting & paging: tool (PagerDuty / OpsGenie / Slack-Discord / none), threshold strategy. Required ≠ none when security.sensitivityTier='high'.

slo.description: SLI/SLO: which metrics, error budget policy. Auto-skipped when scaleTarget ∉ {production-scale, enterprise}.

featureFlags.description: Feature flag system: provider (LaunchDarkly, Unleash, PostHog, Flagsmith, none), flag lifecycle.

maintenanceMode.description: Maintenance mode / graceful degradation: mechanism (DB-flag, env, CDN rule), user UX.

healthChecks.description: Health checks: liveness, readiness, deep health. Platform-driven default.

runbooks.description: Runbooks: storage path (docs/runbooks/), template style, ownership.

incidentProcess.description: Incident process: severity levels, escalation chain, postmortem template.

onCall.description: On-call rotation: tool (PagerDuty schedule, OpsGenie schedule, Discord bot, none).

frontendArchitecture.description: Round 6 — P5 Frontend Architecture (Step 22). Per-persona auto-loop in auto-loop mode.

search.description: Round 6 — Search phase (Step 7). Flat. References dataArchitecture.entities[] (CHECK-R6-2).

fileUploads.description: Round 6 — File Uploads & CDN phase (Step 13). Per-persona auto-loop.

payments.description: Round 6 — Payments phase (Step 15). Per-persona auto-loop (customer-facing vs admin).

designSystem.description: Round 6 — P5.3 Design System phase (Step 23). Flat.

uxAccessibilityPerf.description: Round 6 — P5.6 UX/A11y/Performance phase (Step 24). Per-persona auto-loop. Hosts 3 inline gates (marketing email, push notifications, product analytics).

surfacesByPersona.description: Map of personaId → array of surface names (web-app, mobile-web, native, admin-dashboard)

i18nL10n.description: Round 6 — i18n / l10n phase (Step 25). Flat. Locales array drives translation strategy.

pluginRecommendation.description: Round 6 — P7.5 Plugin Recommendation (Step 21). Reads auth/privacy/security/runtimeOperations/cicdAndDelivery/concerns.featureGating. Does NOT install.

frontendAddenda.description: Added by re-recommendation pass after Step 25 i18n.

featureRoadmap.description: Round 5 — Feature roadmap captured at Step 16. Produces docs/feature-list.json + docs/sprint-contracts/sprint-1.json deterministically.

pluginInstall.description: Round 6 — P10 Plugin Install (Step 30). Reads pluginRecommendation.selected ∪ frontendAddenda; actually runs /plugin marketplace install.

schemaDraftReview.description: Round 5 — Schema & API Draft Review at Step 19. Auto-renders DB/API/Event drafts from R3+R4 discovery, then user reviews/locks.

syntheses.description: Per-phase synthesis-review records. Generate consults these to know which phases the developer explicitly approved; missing syntheses for fully-specified phases produce a warning (not a failure).

dependencies.description: Cross-phase dependency assertions, mirrored from the per-project docs/adr/*-dependencies.json files. Used for cross-check warnings and metadata. Keys are topic names (e.g., 'cicdAndDelivery', 'dataArchitecture'); values are arrays of dependency path strings.

risks.description: Cross-cutting risks collected from inline Q_RISK in each architectural phase + 2 discovery phases. 10 entries max in default cadence.

architecturalFraming.description: Architectural Framing. Fully specified in onboard 2.0.0-alpha.2 Round 2.5 (T5). 3 required enum-locked fields (topology, deploymentShape, scaleTarget) inform all detailed phases P3–P9; boundaryNotes is a loose string for advisory boundary constraints. Placed early in the wizard (Step 2.5) so decisions cascade forward consistently.

topology.description: Service topology. All P3–P9 phases read this for compatibility checks (e.g., microservices + embedded DB contradict; serverless + ORM-native migrations produce a note). Recommended default: monolith for solo/startup, modular-monolith for team projects.

deploymentShape.description: Geographic deployment footprint. cicdAndDelivery reads for env ladder and rollback strategy; dataArchitecture reads for DB hosting model compatibility (edge-distributed constrains ORM choice).

scaleTarget.description: Current scale target (not aspirational). Drives caching, backup, compliance, and release pipeline recommendations across P3–P9. authSecurity (Round 3) calibrates identity recommendations against this.

boundaryNotes.description: Loose advisory field for hard boundary requirements (e.g., 'billing must be isolated from auth', 'PCI data cannot touch user PII'). grill-spec cross-checks against topology; synthesis renders as a note. Empty string OK; null is not.

architecturalValidation.description: Architectural Validation. Fully specified in onboard 2.0.0-alpha.2 Round 2.5 (T6). Final wizard step (Step 11) — a meta-phase that reads from all approved phase syntheses (architecturalFraming, dataArchitecture, apiIntegration, cicdAndDelivery) and records the developer's cross-phase sign-off. Does not capture new primitive answers; captures sign-off status, detected divergences from framing values, any unresolved contradictions, and final maintainer notes.

signOffStatus.description: Developer's final sign-off on the cross-phase validation report. 'approved' = all phases consistent; 'approved-with-noted-divergences' = divergences acknowledged, proceed with caution; 'requires-rework' = contradictions must be resolved before scaffolding (grill-spec blocks Phase 2).

divergences.description: List of detected divergences where a final phase value differs from the architectural framing assumption. Each entry records which phase changed, from what value to what value, and why. Optional — empty array is acceptable.

phase.description: Phase ID that diverged from framing (e.g., 'dataArchitecture', 'apiIntegration', 'cicdAndDelivery').

toFinalValue.description: Final value approved in the later phase synthesis.

reason.description: Why the divergence occurred or was accepted.

unresolvedContradictions.description: List of contradiction descriptions that could not be resolved before sign-off. Non-empty only when signOffStatus is 'approved-with-noted-divergences'. Grill-spec surfaces these as awareness notes (non-blocking for that status). Optional — empty array is acceptable.

finalNotes.description: Free-text note for future maintainers about divergences, rework scope, or sign-off context. Populated from AV.Q2 (conditional). Empty string OK; null is not.

riskReconciliation.description: Round 4 — front section of Step 15. Walks each captured risk + asks reconciliation status.

topFollowups.description: Risk IDs flagged as worth a feature-list.json followup card.

deferredPhase.description: Stub for phases that will be expanded in later rounds. Onboard 2.0.0-alpha.1 accepts these as inert pass-through metadata.

_status.description: Marker indicating which round will fully specify this phase. Use 'deferred-to-round-?' if uncertain.

cicdAndDelivery.description: CI/CD & Operations. Fully specified in onboard 2.0.0-alpha.1 Round 1. The cicd subobject is the new wizard surface (Q5.4-Q5.17, 14 fields); _v1_carryover preserves Q5.1-Q5.3 answers.

envLadder.description: Ordered list of environments deploys progress through. Single-env projects emit [prod] only.

_v1_carryover.description: Existing Q5.1/Q5.2/Q5.3 answers preserved verbatim from greenfield 2.x. Mirrored from greenfield-state.json top-level fields during context-gathering Step 5.

lockedYaml.description: Round 6 — Locked CI YAML emitted by render-ci-drafts.sh after Step 20 Approve. Onboard writes verbatim at scaffold time.

adjustHistory.description: R-R6-10 mitigation — audit trail of each Adjust call.

dataArchitecture.description: Data Architecture. Fully specified in onboard 2.0.0-alpha.2 Round 2. Hybrid strictness: 4 required enum-locked fields (databaseHost, orm, migrationsTool, multiTenancy) drive cross-phase contradictions; remaining fields are loose strings to accommodate a fast-moving tooling landscape (Turso, EdgeDB, pgvector, Drizzle, Kysely, etc.).

databaseHost.description: Hosting model category. cicdAndDelivery cross-references for rollback strategy (point-in-time recovery only on managed).

orm.description: Data access layer. apiIntegration reads for validation lib / API codegen pairing. Future workflow reads for CI migration step strategy.

migrationsTool.description: Migration tool. Future workflow reads for CI pipeline migration step.

multiTenancy.description: Isolation strategy. Future authSecurity reads for auth/authz model (RLS vs schema isolation drives session token shape).

engine.description: Specific DB engine (postgresql, mysql, mongodb, edgedb, turso, etc.). Loose for landscape-churn tolerance.

search.description: Search/retrieval strategy (DB FTS, dedicated engine, vector store, hybrid, none).

cache.description: Caching layer (none, in-memory, Redis, multi-layer, etc.).

fileStorage.description: File/object storage (cloud-S3-like, local-FS, CDN-only, hybrid, none).

codegen.description: Codegen tools selected (Prisma generate, Drizzle kit, SQLC, GraphQL codegen, OpenAPI TS, Protobuf, etc.). Empty array OK.

backup.description: Backup & retention strategy (none, managed-provider, scheduled-dumps, continuous).

compliance.description: Data residency/compliance constraint (none, region-locked, GDPR-aware, HIPAA, etc.).

apiIntegration.description: API & Integration. Fully specified in onboard 2.0.0-alpha.2 Round 2. 3 required enum-locked fields (style, versioningPolicy, asyncPattern) drive cross-phase contradictions; remaining fields loose. Single-owner boundary: real-time, webhooks, jobs live in apiIntegration; caching, file storage, codegen live in dataArchitecture.

style.description: API style. Drives dataArchitecture codegen pairing (GraphQL codegen ↔ style=graphql). Future authSecurity reads for auth integration pattern.

versioningPolicy.description: Version negotiation strategy. Future workflow reads for ADR template; cicdAndDelivery release pipeline cross-references.

asyncPattern.description: Background-work pattern. Future workflow reads for CI test strategy. cicdAndDelivery conceptually depends for deployment topology.

documentation.description: API docs tool (OpenAPI/Swagger, GraphQL Playground, auto-from-types, Scalar, Redoc, etc.).

rateLimit.description: Rate-limit strategy (none, fixed-window, sliding, token-bucket, per-user, per-IP, gateway-level).

realtime.description: Real-time delivery (none, WebSockets, SSE, HTTP long-poll, external pub/sub).

webhooks.description: Webhook directions (none, incoming-only, outgoing-only, both) + tooling notes.

externalServices.description: External integrations (Stripe, SendGrid, Twilio, Segment, etc.). Multi-select free-text. Empty array OK.
